title: Breakthrough English (A1)
summary: A complete A1 ESL pathway focused on basic personal information, classroom English, simple messages.
assessment: Unit quizzes, skill checks, progress test and end-of-level CEFR checkpoint

modules.title: Introductions
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about introductions with appropriate accuracy and support.

modules.title: Family and Friends
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about family and friends with appropriate accuracy and support.

modules.title: Classroom Language
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about classroom language with appropriate accuracy and support.

modules.title: Food and Shopping
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about food and shopping with appropriate accuracy and support.

modules.title: Daily Routines
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about daily routines with appropriate accuracy and support.

modules.title: Places in Town
modules.outcome: Learners can use A1 language to communicate about places in town with appropriate accuracy and support.

certificatePathway: A1 diagnostic report -> recommended modules -> end-of-level achievement certificate
